headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Launches $100 Million Texas Workforce Push For Advanced Manufacturing
summary: Caterpillar launched a five year, $100 million Building the Future Workforce Initiative in Texas focused on advanced manufacturing and industry technician roles. The program is designed to expand training, education, and talent pipelines in key Texan communities where Caterpillar operates. This workforce investment adds a fresh dimension to recent conversations about NYSE:CAT that have centered on index inclusion, valuation, and sentiment. Caterpillar, traded as NYSE:CAT, is putting...
